holdings.infoBox: IVSS is an equity ETF with a total of 362 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sterling Infrastructure stock at 3.07%, Sezzle at 1.85%, Nextpower at 1.78%, Dave Inc. at 1.60%, and InterDigital at 1.58%.

overview.description: The Applied Finance IVS US SMID ETF (IVSS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of 150 small- to mid-cap companies in the US, believed to have superior return potential. The fund uses an Intrinsic Value Stewardship (IVS) analytical model to select its constituents. IVSS was launched on Dec 3, 2025 and is issued by Applied Finance.
